TextView.android:text: Type or speak to get started.
Axiom needs a few permissions to learn from your habits and send smart suggestions.
Download the Seed model to enable full neural inference. Keyword mode is active until then.
Consolidating today's learning while you sleep
All learning happened on this device · 0 bytes sent anywhere
Axiom dreams while your phone charges after 8 PM.
Building your model — use Axiom for a few days to see patterns here.
read from your device · 0 bytes sent anywhere
This thought never left your phone.
your device · right now · no cloud
No internet used. No data sent to any server. No query logged anywhere.\n\nA comparable ChatGPT request crosses 3 data centres and is stored on a remote server. This used 0.
All inference on-device · No data leaves your phone
